```latex
\begin{itemize}
    \item $W(\mathbb{P}_0, \mathbb{P}_{\theta}) = |\theta|$,
    \item $JS(\mathbb{P}_0, \mathbb{P}_{\theta}) = 
        \begin{cases} 
            \log 2 & \text{if } \theta \neq 0 \\
            0 & \text{if } \theta = 0
        \end{cases}$,
    \item $KL(\mathbb{P}_{\theta} \| \mathbb{P}_0) = KL(\mathbb{P}_0 \| \mathbb{P}_{\theta}) = 
        \begin{cases} 
            +\infty & \text{if } \theta \neq 0 \\
            0 & \text{if } \theta = 0
        \end{cases}$,
    \item $\delta(\mathbb{P}_0, \mathbb{P}_{\theta}) = 
        \begin{cases} 
            1 & \text{if } \theta \neq 0 \\
            0 & \text{if } \theta = 0
        \end{cases}$.
\end{itemize}
```

data.content:
```latex
KL(\mathbb{P}_n \parallel \mathbb{P}_m) = \int \log(f_n) \, d\mathbb{P}_n

\leq \log(1 + \epsilon) + \int_{A_n} \log(f_n) \, d\mathbb{P}_n

\leq \log(1 + \epsilon) + \log(3)\mathbb{P}_n(A_n)

\leq \log(1 + \epsilon) + \log(3)\left(\frac{1}{\epsilon} + 1\right)\delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P})
```
data.latex:
```latex
KL(\mathbb{P}_n \parallel \mathbb{P}_m) = \int \log(f_n) \, d\mathbb{P}_n

\leq \log(1 + \epsilon) + \int_{A_n} \log(f_n) \, d\mathbb{P}_n

\leq \log(1 + \epsilon) + \log(3)\mathbb{P}_n(A_n)

\leq \log(1 + \epsilon) + \log(3)\left(\frac{1}{\epsilon} + 1\right)\delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P})
```

data.content:
```latex
\epsilon \mathbb{P}_m(A_n) \leq \mathbb{P}_n(A_n) - \mathbb{P}_m(A_n)
\leq |\mathbb{P}_n(A_n) - \mathbb{P}_m(A_n)|
\leq \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P}_m)
\leq \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P}).
```

```latex

\leq |\mathbb{P}_n(A_n) - \mathbb{P}_m(A_n)|
\leq \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P}_m)
\leq \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P}).
```

data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
\mathbb{P}_n(A_n) &\leq \mathbb{P}_m(A_n) + |\mathbb{P}_n(A_n) - \mathbb{P}_m(A_n)| \\
&\leq \frac{1}{\epsilon} \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P}) + \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P}_m) \\
&\leq \frac{1}{\epsilon} \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P}) + \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P}) \\
&\leq \left( \frac{1}{\epsilon} + 1 \right) \delta(\mathbb{P}_n, \mathbb{P})
\end{align*}
```

```latex
L_D(D, g_\theta) = \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_r}[D(x)] + \mathbb{E}_{z \sim p(z)}[(m - D(g_\theta(z)))^+]

```

data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
\inf_{0 \leq D(x) \leq m} L_D(D, g_\theta) &= m + \inf_{0 \leq D(x) \leq m} \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_r}[D(x)] - \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_\theta}[D(x)] \\
&= m + \inf_{-\frac{m}{2} \leq D(x) \leq \frac{m}{2}} \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_r}[D(x)] - \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_\theta}[D(x)] \\
&= m + \frac{m}{2} \inf_{-1 \leq f(x) \leq 1} \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_r}[f(x)] - \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_\theta}[f(x)]
\end{align*}
```

```latex
&= m + \inf_{-\frac{m}{2} \leq D(x) \leq \frac{m}{2}} \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_r}[D(x)] - \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_\theta}[D(x)] \\
&= m + \frac{m}{2} \inf_{-1 \leq f(x) \leq 1} \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_r}[f(x)] - \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_\theta}[f(x)]
\end{align*}
```

data.latex: { \underset { - 1 \leq f ( x ) \leq 1 } { \operatorname* { i n f } } } \mathbb { E } _ { x \sim \mathbb { P } _ { r } } [ f ( x ) ] - \mathbb { E } _ { x \sim \mathbb { P } _ { \theta } } [ f ( x ) ] = - \delta ( \mathbb { P } _ { r } , \mathbb { P } _ { \theta } )

data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
|\mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_r}[f(x)] - \mathbb{E}_{x \sim \mathbb{P}_\theta}[f(x)]| &= |\int f \, \mathrm{d}\mathbb{P}_r - \int f \, \mathrm{d}\mathbb{P}_\theta| \\
&= |\int f \, \mathrm{d}\mu| \\
&\leq \int |f| \, \mathrm{d}|\mu| \leq \int 1 \, \mathrm{d}|\mu| \\
&= |\mu|(\mathcal{X}) = \| \mu \|_{TV} = \delta(\mathbb{P}_r, \mathbb{P}_\theta)
\end{align*}
```
